understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a series of grid-based levels, each containing one or more goal cells. To complete a level, the player must step onto every goal cell while their carried piece's shape, color, and rotation exactly match that goal's requirements. The game is won by completing all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player's piece has three attributes: shape (index 0-5), color (orange, blue, green, red), and rotation (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°). Moving in any of the four cardinal directions costs 1 stamina. Running out of stamina causes the loss of a life and resets stamina to its maximum. Losing all lives results in a game over. The grid contains walls that block movement in certain directions; the state always includes a list of currently blocked directions. Special tiles modify the piece's attributes: shape modifier tiles cycle the shape to the next in sequence, color modifier tiles cycle the color (orange -> blue -> green -> red -> orange), and rotation modifier tiles rotate the piece 90° clockwise. A goal cell becomes active only when the piece's attributes match its requirements; stepping onto an active goal completes it. Completing all goals in a level advances to the next level. Stamina refill tiles restore stamina. Planning an efficient route that collects the necessary modifiers before reaching goals is critical to success.
